summary: Hierarchical Knowledge engine verified end-to-end. Backend: 46/46 pytest PASS (atomic 9-step wizard happy paths with/without stages, all 10 rejection cases persist NOTHING, full Stage CRUD + up/down move + no-op past ends + delete cascade, full Component CRUD with parent stage inheritance + move + invalid-status/progress/stage_id/parent guards, component_id validation on Task and Check-in POST, goal_id/component_id filter combinations on /api/tasks and /api/checkins via $or union, cascade component delete detaches (not deletes) linked tasks/checkins, journey delete cleans up stages+components+goal, legacy backfill idempotent for test@hymn.app, user isolation). Frontend: tab-knowledge present, tab-learn absent, wizard step-gating correct for all 9 steps (Continue/Finish disabled until each step valid, step 6 target date optional), completing wizard atomically creates and redirects to /knowledge/{id} with SKILL tag, both stages, EO, task, Weekly chip, comp add + child + stage up/down reorder all functional via the tree UI, legacy journey opens without crash and shows STRUCTURE section.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow. Non-blocking but should be migrated. Reference: repeated across screens.
Console warning: Image: style.resizeMode is deprecated. Please use props.resizeMode. Non-blocking.

action_items: OPTIONAL: migrate deprecated RN style shadow* -> boxShadow and Image style.resizeMode -> props.resizeMode across the app to remove console warnings.
OPTIONAL: server.py is now ~2000 lines. Split per-resource routers (already flagged in iteration 8).
critical_code_review_comments: Atomic wizard rollback implemented correctly (reverse-order deletion in try/except), but the failure branch uses `"$in" in str(f)` to decide between delete_one and delete_many — brittle string inspection of a dict repr. Prefer an explicit flag or always use delete_many for the multi-doc case.

delete_knowledge_journey deletes EOs by goal_id but does NOT detach tasks/checkins whose expected_outcome belongs to that goal — those tasks/checkins keep dangling expected_outcome_id references. Verified against `TestJourneyDeleteCascade`: journey delete returned 200, task still returns 200 with component_id=None but with a now-orphan expected_outcome_id. Consider either also deleting those tasks/checkins or explicitly setting expected_outcome_id=None.

list_knowledge_journeys calls _backfill_legacy_journeys on every read — verified idempotent, but O(N) domain/journey scans on hot GET path; acceptable at current scale, may need a one-time migration + skip flag later.
seed_data_creation: Tests create fresh TEST_kh_* users per module run (auto-cleaned by user isolation). Under test@hymn.app one long-lived TEST_UI_Chess journey with 2 stages and 1 Openings component was created by the frontend flow — safe to leave (prefixed TEST_UI_).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_knowledge_hierarchy.py (module-scoped fixtures, run whole file). Frontend wizard testIDs: knowledge-wizard, wizard-type-{skill|book|course|subject|professional_qualification|custom}, wizard-title-input, wizard-has-stages-yes/-no, wizard-stage-input, wizard-stage-add, wizard-stage-row-{i}, wizard-stage-up-{i}, wizard-stage-down-{i}, wizard-stage-remove-{i}, wizard-why-input, wizard-target-date-input, wizard-outcome-title-input, wizard-task-title-input, wizard-cadence-{daily|weekly|monthly|manual}, wizard-next-button, wizard-finish-button, wizard-prev-button, wizard-cancel, wizard-cancel-confirm, wizard-error. Detail testIDs: knowledge-journey-detail, kj-title, kj-back, kj-edit-goal, kj-delete, kj-add-stage, kj-add-component, kj-stage-{id}, kj-stage-up-{id}, kj-stage-down-{id}, kj-stage-add-comp-{id}, kj-stage-edit-{id}, kj-stage-delete-{id}, comp-node-{id}, comp-up-{id}, comp-down-{id}, comp-add-child-{id}, comp-edit-{id}, comp-delete-{id}, comp-sheet-name, comp-sheet-type, comp-sheet-status-{status}, comp-sheet-progress, comp-sheet-notes, comp-sheet-save, comp-sheet-cancel, stage-sheet-name, stage-sheet-save, stage-sheet-cancel, kj-eo-{id}, kj-task-{id}, kj-checkin-{id}, kj-stage-delete-modal, kj-comp-delete-modal, kj-journey-delete-modal. Auth: sign-in-email-input / sign-in-password-input / sign-in-submit-button (no /login route; app renders auth at /).
